languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "Confirmed: the sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly. Protocol for exchange of sacred regalia initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's gaze fixes on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the forge world Stygies VIII." {n}A scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic, almost as if Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."

languages.text: {n}Вокс Паскаля издает бинарную трель, торжественную и подавляющую.{/n} "Таинство обслуживания технореликвии совершено корректно, подтверждено. Инициирован протокол обмена священными регалиями". {n}Взгляд техножреца впивается в робу Эоганна.{/n} "Фиксирую принадлежность данной благодатной техноединицы к клиру {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}мира-кузни{/g} Стигия VIII". {n}В синем оптическом аугменте мелькает схожая с подозрительным прищуром алая искра.{/n} "Запрашиваю подтверждение информированности о нормативах действующего на данном судне катехизиса обслуживания и безопасности".

traits.locale_text: {n}Вокс Паскаля издает издает бинарную трель, торжественную и подавляющую.{/n} "Таинство обслуживания технореликвии совершено корректно, подтверждено. Инициирован протокол обмена священными регалиями". {n}Визоры техножреца впиваются в робу Эо-ганна.{/n} "Фиксирую принадлежность данной благодатной техноединицы к клиру {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}мира-кузни{/g} Стигия VIII". {n}В синем оптическом аугменте мелькает схожая с подозрительным прищуром алая искра.{/n} "Запрашиваю подтверждение информированности о нормативах действующего на данном судне катехизиса обслуживания и безопасности".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: {n}パスカルのボイスが、厳粛で圧迫感の強いバイナリカル・トリルを奏でる。{/n}「テク・レリックの維持の聖典が正しく執り行われたことを確認。聖なる装束交換プロトコルを開始する。」{n}テク・プリーストのバイザーがエオガンのローブに固定される。{/n}「この祝福されたテク・ユニットの所属を、鍛冶世界スティギウス8世聖職者に登録する。」{n}パスカルが疑いの目を向けているかのように、彼の青い光学増幅器に赤いスパークがちらつく。{/n}「このユニットが、この船舶で有効なメンテナンスと安全の教義書の内容を熟知していることを確認するよう依頼する」
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "The sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly, confirmed. Sacred regalia exchange protocol initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's visors fix on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the forge world Stygies VIII." {n}As though Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion, a scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."

languages.text: {n}Aus Pasqals Vox ertönt ein gleichermaßen feierliches wie beklemmendes binhärisches Trillern.{/n} "Bestätigt: Das Sakrament der Wartung von Tech-Relikten wurde korrekt ausgeführt. Protokoll für den Austausch heiliger Insignien initialisiert." {n}Der Blick des Techpriesters ruht auf Eogunns Robe.{/n} "Registriere die Zugehörigkeit dieser gesegneten Tech-Einheit zur Priesterschaft der {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}Fabrikwelt{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}Ein purpurner Funke flackert in seiner blauen optischen Augmentation, als hätte Pasqal argwöhnisch die Augen zusammengekniffen.{/n} "Erbitte Bestätigung der Vertrautheit der Einheit mit den Standards des auf diesem Schiff geltenden Katechismus der Wartung und Sicherheit."
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "Confirmed: the sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly. Protocol for exchange of sacred regalia initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's gaze fixes on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}forge world{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}A scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic, almost as if Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus Pasqals Vox ertönt ein gleichermaßen feierliches wie beklemmendes binhärisches Trillern.{/n} "Bestätigt: Das Sakrament der Wartung von Tech-Relikten wurde korrekt ausgeführt. Protokoll für den Austausch heiliger Insignien initialisiert." {n}Der Blick des Techpriesters ruht auf Eogunns Robe.{/n} "Registriere die Zugehörigkeit dieser gesegneten Tech-Einheit zur Priesterschaft der {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}Fabrikwelt{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}Ein purpurner Funke flackert in seiner blauen optischen Augmentation, als hätte Pasqal argwöhnisch die Augen zusammengekniffen.{/n} "Erbitte Bestätigung der Vertrautheit der Einheit mit den Standards des auf diesem Schiff geltenden Katechismus der Wartung und Sicherheit."

languages.text: {n}El voco de Pasqal emite un trino solemne y opresivo en lenguaje binario.{/n} «Confirmada la correcta celebración del sacramento del mantenimiento de tecnorreliquias. Iniciando protocolo de intercambio de formalidades litúrgicas». {n}La mirada del tecnosacerdote se centra en el hábito de Eogunn.{/n} «Registrando afiliación de esta bendita tecnounidad al clero del {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}mundo forja{/g} de Stygies VIII». {n}Se produce un destello escarlata en el aumento ocular azul de Pasqal, como si hubiese entrecerrado los ojos con suspicacia.{/n} «Solicitando confirmación de la familiaridad de la unidad con los preceptos del Catequismo de Mantenimiento y Seguridad vigentes en este navío».
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "Confirmed: the sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly. Protocol for exchange of sacred regalia initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's gaze fixes on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}forge world{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}A scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic, almost as if Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."

Iniciando protocolo de intercambio de formalidades litúrgicas». {n}La mirada del tecnosacerdote se centra en el hábito de Eogunn.{/n} «Registrando afiliación de esta bendita tecnounidad al clero del {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}mundo forja{/g} de Stygies VIII». {n}Se produce un destello escarlata en el aumento ocular azul de Pasqal, como si hubiese entrecerrado los ojos con suspicacia.{/n} «Solicitando confirmación de la familiaridad de la unidad con los preceptos del Catequismo de Mantenimiento y Seguridad vigentes en este navío».

languages.text: {n}Pasqal'ın voksundan ciddi ve kasvetli bir ikilidil nağme yayılıyor.{/n} "Tekno yadigâr bakım ayininin doğru bir şekilde gerçekleştirildiği onaylandı. Kutsal sembol değişimi protokolü başlatıldı." {n}Tekno Rahip, Eogunn'un cübbesine odaklanıyor.{/n} "Bu mübarek tekno birimin Stygies VIII {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}döküm dünyası{/g} ruhban sınıfına aidiyeti kaydedilmekte." {n}Pasqal sanki şüpheyle gözlerini kısmış gibi mavi optik ogmentinde kızıl bir kıvılcım titreşiyor.{/n} "Birimin bu gemide yürürlükte olan Bakım ve Güvenlik İlmihâli standartlarına aşinalığının onaylanmasını talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "Confirmed: the sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly. Protocol for exchange of sacred regalia initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's gaze fixes on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}forge world{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}A scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic, almost as if Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqal'ın voksundan ciddi ve kasvetli bir ikilidil nağme yayılıyor.{/n} "Tekno yadigâr bakım ayininin doğru bir şekilde gerçekleştirildiği onaylandı. Kutsal sembol değişimi protokolü başlatıldı." {n}Tekno Rahip, Eogunn'un cübbesine odaklanıyor.{/n} "Bu mübarek tekno birimin Stygies VIII {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}döküm dünyası{/g} ruhban sınıfına aidiyeti kaydedilmekte." {n}Pasqal sanki şüpheyle gözlerini kısmış gibi mavi optik ogmentinde kızıl bir kıvılcım titreşiyor.{/n} "Birimin bu gemide yürürlükte olan Bakım ve Güvenlik İlmihâli standartlarına aşinalığının onaylanmasını talep ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}Le vox de Pasqal émet un trille binhaire solennel et oppressant.{/n} « Confirmation : le sacrement de maintenance des technoreliques a été correctement accompli. Initialisation du protocole d'échange des formalités sacrées d'usage. » {n}Le regard du technoprêtre se pose sur la robe d'Eogunn.{/n} « Affiliation de cette techno-unité bénie au clergé du {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}monde forge{/g} Stygies VIII notée. »{n}Comme si Pasqal avait plissé les yeux dans un élan de suspicion, son augmétique optique bleu scintille d'une étincelle écarlate.{/n} « Demande de confirmation de la familiarité de l'unité avec les normes du catéchisme de maintenance et de sécurité en vigueur sur ce vaisseau. »
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "Confirmed: the sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly. Protocol for exchange of sacred regalia initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's gaze fixes on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}forge world{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}A scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic, almost as if Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."

Initialisation du protocole d'échange des formalités sacrées d'usage. » {n}Le regard du technoprêtre se pose sur la robe d'Eogunn.{/n} « Affiliation de cette techno-unité bénie au clergé du {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}monde forge{/g} Stygies VIII notée. »{n}Comme si Pasqal avait plissé les yeux dans un élan de suspicion, son augmétique optique bleu scintille d'une étincelle écarlate.{/n} « Demande de confirmation de la familiarité de l'unité avec les normes du catéchisme de maintenance et de sécurité en vigueur sur ce vaisseau. »

languages.text: {n}帕斯卡的音阵发出一阵二进制颤音，肃穆而沉重。{/n}“确认：技术圣物维护圣礼已正确执行。神圣圣物交换协议已启动。”{n}技术神甫的目光锁定在伊奥贡的长袍上。{/n}“记录该受祝技术单位为{g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}铸造世界{/g}斯泰吉斯8号的神职人员。”{n}帕斯卡的蓝色光学植入物中闪过一丝猩红火花，似乎正怀疑地眯起眼睛。{/n}“请求确认该单位熟知本舰现行《维护与安全教典》标准。”
